description: Traqq has made my work experience as a freelancer much more easier and well organized. It allows me track my time, manage my clients, generate invoices and track expenses most effectively.
author: Amal B.
pros: Traqq is very easy to use. With a simple push of a button, work time is recorded. Traqq packs many good features. Most notably, automated screenshots and videos, smart notification and alerts, flexible reporting options, individual and group timesheet management. Traqq provides automated work time tracking and it runs in the background of my Windows PC, without crashing or slowing it down. If you are forgetful like me, an alert popup window will show up reminding you to turn on/off traqq. Very practical! As a freelancer, I set up my daily report and receive it on my email. I provide it later for my clients as a proof that the number of hours I submitted was correct.
cons: There is nothing that I don't like in this app. But there is some improvements that can be done. It would be great if timesheets are presented using charts and graphics. And I would love to get the mobile version of the app very soon.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great tool for organizing the team's workload and performance
description: Simple yet complete, I've been using the web dashboard + the app, which integrates nicely with the taskbar for easy tracking. In addition, it allows you to automatize reports (receive daily/weekly monthly) by email, so you don't have to log in and do a manual check if you want to follow the progress of a specific team/team member. It is very easy to use and customizable, depending on the flexibility you want to give the team.
author: Eliana D.
pros: For a team working in different locations, Traqq allows tracking & view each team member's workload easily. It is easy to use and does not take extra time to record and report.
cons: Nothing so far. I would like to have the possibility to set up reminders to take breaks or to set daily time limits, just to improve my working time/productivity.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Lawunn K.
pros: The team management feature is excellent. It's easy to manage the entire team and see performance levels of each employee.
cons: While Traqq is great for time tracking, it doesn't fully replace project management tools. Having more project management features would be nice​.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Very nice and easy to control, and as for the new user i would recommend this to other companies.
author: Alexandra Ann B.
pros: This software is very useful, our employees learn to teach themself self discipline to manager their own times.
cons: How the Traqq easily navigate. And there is enough tutorial how to navigate it.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Vanessa R.
pros: Traqq is super helpful in monitoring team progress, identifying needed training, simplifying operational processes, and also cheering the team on when they meet goals! It’s very easy to see how projects are progressing, and step in if needed to ensure deliverables are met.
cons: One area Traqq could improve is the addition or development of a mobile app, as it would be nice to monitor teams from any mobile device. Remote teams are always on the go!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Love it! Simple and easy to use.
description: We will have new staff members, and I would like to integrate with Traqq and let them know how it works. It will be helpful for our work with websites and newsletters.
author: Ivica J.
pros: In our day-to-day work at Nimbl Inc. with website maintenance and graphic design, we can share our ideas and ask for suggestions by making shots, sending short records to each other, and marking them up in real time, which is fantastic.
cons: A few features from the Mac version are missing.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: If someone needs a more detailed Tracking Desktop App, then "Traqq" could be the right choice. Tracking time has never been more accurate and more colorful than the one that is depicted by "Traqq".
author: Mihai D.
pros: I have liked the way that the performance of the freelancers is nicely and graphically represented concerning the time that they have spent on their work. The Graphical User Information of this Tracking Desktop App is quite impressive.
cons: I am coming from a background of using Tracking Desktop Apps such as the ones maintained by "Freelancer", "Guru", and even "Upwork". They are more related to the direct relationship between an individual freelancer and the freelancing portal. I have seen the "Traqq" App on a "Mac O.S. X" machine. It has a great design. It is nicely integrated into the System-Tray. Functionally, it is better suited for a Project Manager who is watching their whole Team at once. What has impressed me is the way that the time is nicely and graphically represented following the performance of the freelancers. Still, for an individual freelancer, it is a little bit too much that somebody lower than the Project Management level would require.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Traqq-An innovative way to track remote hours
author: Elizabeth P.
pros: Traqq's application is set up with ease in just minutes. Inexpensive when compared to other time tracking software. An ethical and simplified approach to monitoring remote employee activity, with the ability for employees to monitor themselves. Understanding how their activity level affects their performance and task completion success, enables the employee to improve their work flow output. The app conducts frequent screenshots, which are blurred, protecting any confidential information, with only the website being visible.
cons: Allowing the employee to delete their time, is a red flag for me. Seeing that would raise questions in my mind, as to why they were deleting a block of time. The drawback is not necessarily the deletion but that when the "Deleted Time" report is ran, the screenshots are missing. The report only includes the amount of time that was deleted. It would be better if those screenshots were still available somehow.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: If you’re looking for an app that just works, with support that actually responds if you have any questions. Then I recommend Traqq!
author: Trent W.
pros: As a HR manager who looks after remote workers. I can say this is simply the best. Everything you need to see is intuitive and accessible with a simple click. You can literally see the time spent on each app and with the inbuilt pay rate calculations, payroll for work reported on vs work done is a breeze. Reporting is no different, reports are easily generated for your team and can be accessed by other HR personnel who may need to access it at a later date.
cons: A phone app would be a great addition to the software. But besides that I don't see anything I dislike.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: Overall, I managed to keep track of how much time the employees were actually sourcing candidate pools while before we only judged based on their end results. With Traqq we managed to increase or productivity levels to about 75% allowing us to reach our quarterly targets way before the the quarter ended. We plan to continue using Traqq and fully integrating it into our organization.
author: Samia Q.
pros: The apps best feature, with accordance to my job requirement, would be being able to track our employees' time spent searching for potential talent for the positions assigned to them daily while also generating a report weekly for my Manager to review. It was so easy for me to get a grasp of all the features in this app. My job requires me to ensure our company's remote employees and in-house employees are all working towards reaching our quarterly target, and by using this app I was successfully able to monitor the time they spent in actually finding a solid candidate pool. The screenshots of their screens gave me an understanding of whether they were making candidate calls or if they were just slacking off at low activity points on their timeline. Traqq is a highly effective time tracking tool and I would recommend the app to any small enterprise or moderate sized organizations too.
cons: Traqq has been a fantastic tool for me as an Assistant Manager incharge of observing employee productivity. A very minor con would be that the screenshots need to be blurred out 10% more as, at times, I could make out some of the employees personal information such as e-mails or messages done in their off time when they have forgotten to pause their tracking or delete such screenshots.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Advanced tracking features and excellent support
author: Samuele R.
pros: Traqq's seamless setup made onboarding quick and easy for our team. Its advanced tracking features, such as automated screenshots and personalized notifications, significantly boost our productivity. Additionally, the dedicated account manager provides excellent support, ensuring a smooth experience.
cons: Traqq could benefit from expanding its integration options to better fit into existing workflows. The absence of a mobile app limits its flexibility for users on the go. Additionally, incorporating direct payroll management features would further streamline operations.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Brandon B.
pros: Great time tracking tool for freelancers like myself. Seamless onboarding and my client(s) can feel at ease knowing that I am being completely honest about billable hours. The app also takes screenshots and screen recordings while working to further reaffirm my client(s) trust. Their commitment to privacy in that respect is also to be admired as the app blurs the images and screen recordings so as to protect any private info from being shown. Plus it's free!!
cons: There is currently no mobile app which causes a problem for the kind of work I do.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Fantastic time tracker at a fantastic value
author: Adam C.
pros: Traqq's time tracking feature is very subtle, users simply see a timer in the corner of their screen so it's very unassuming and users will barely notice it. From the admin perspective the web portal is fantastic, the interface is easy to use. The dashboards give you as an admin a great breakdown of employee activity and allow you to dig into employee activity to track productivity and performance. The pricing for the functionality is outstanding as well.
cons: The reports defaultly make you select employees instead of displaying direct reports automatically but that's something they could be fixing in the future.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Time tracker that is both employee and HR friendly
description: I would rate as 9/10 only due to the downsides but these can be easily improved.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Hi! The past 3 years I've been working remotely and have experienced time-tracking apps. While I don't mind what the apps do, actually it felt a little intrusive. Good thing about Traqq is they have this blur feature when taking snaps and some snaps can also be deleted. While I understand the need for micro-management especially in this kind of setup, as an employee I would prefer if my boss has a little trust and respect for me by not necessarily knowing all the details of what I'm working on. At least with the blurring effect not every detail is exposed whilst still being able to give my boss assurance that I'm making a good use of my time. I think this is a win-win for everyone. Also, it has a feat that reminds you when you're being idle for sometime. As an employee/user, I think this happens to other fellow freelancers especially when they get overwhelmed so a gentle reminder would help them get back on track.
cons: Honestly, I haven't really used for significant time. But so far, I think it has no mobile app and that the HR can see deleted snaps from tracker. Personally, I think deleted snaps should no longer be accessible to the HRs or at least set restrictive process when accessing deleted snaps as the snaps were deleted by the user for a reason. I also think it should have a mobile counterpart as some users, me for instance, prefer being able to switch from company to personal device from time to time and it would be good to be able to access tracker on my personal device so I can check whenever even when I'm not working. Aside from these minor dents, I think there are no other downsides with app and is overall a great app.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: The problems Traqq solves from my point of view is not the slacking of employees, but the ability of the team manager to understand the habits of the employees and adapt the tasks and workload according to the employee behaviour. Also you can track the activity of the employee and invite them to a talk in the case of underachieving the levels it used to reach to know what is happening and adapt the situation. For myself, I am using this app to set myself a competitive rithm of work with a minimum activity level that I set for myself and also I am tracking my peak performance times of the day.
author: George D.
pros: For me as a first time user, I didn't use a work tracking app as complex as this one. What did I like about it? Firstly, I was impressed by the ability of taking screenshots at ten minutes intervals in which you showcase you work throughout the day. A benefit from this feature is that you don't need to upload them by yourself and you can pause Traqq anytime you are not working. I think one of the features that I liked the most was the ability of observing the work habits and establish the moments of the day when I am the most productive and when I tend to slack a bit so this can help me focus on the heavier tasks at my peak performance intervals. The simplicity of understanding the app as a first user was a pleasant surprise as I got the hang of it after 10 minutes of navigating through the menus presented. From the UI/UX perspective the usage is very nice, with a intuitive flow added to it.
cons: The only changes that I might add to the development of this app that for me was a nice experience is maybe the highlight of the widget on the desktop to be a little more visible ( maybe a stronger contrast) and adding a report for me as an employee where I can see an analysis of when I am the most productive ( the begining of the sprint, middle or end of the sprint) aswell as the time intervals of my productivity. Also I would like to be notified when my Activity drops below a certain threshold that I could set so I can set a minimum of activity for myself.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The mouse and keyboard activity tracking in Tragg provides a good measure of user activity. It has been helpful in ensuring our team stays productive throughout the workday.
cons: The mouse and keyboard activity tracking can sometimes be a bit too much, making some team members feel overly monitored. Perhaps a less intrusive approach would be more appreciated.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: As a consultant, Traqq has become an indispensable tool for managing my time and ensuring accurate billing for my clients. The app's intuitive interface and precise time tracking allow me to monitor the duration spent on each project or task. The ability to generate detailed reports simplifies the billing process and provides transparency to my clients.
cons: One area where Traqq could enhance its functionality is by integrating with popular invoicing platforms such as FreshBooks or QuickBooks. This would streamline the process of creating invoices based on tracked time and eliminate the need for manual data transfer.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: So far it has been a seamless journey without hiccups.
author: Florence O.
pros: The ability for me to track employees, know if they are actually working or idle.
cons: Everything I need is in the app. My daily needs as an employer are well integrated into this application
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Experience using Traqq on a remote-based team
author: Rachel S.
pros: The app is fantastic for tracking time, even when offline. It syncs up once you get back online, ensuring accurate and verifiable tracking regardless of connectivity.
cons: The automatic screenshots can be a bit intrusive and disrupt the workflow. Also, there might be a lag when it's recording desktop activity​
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: I could easily delete any unwanted screenshots taken, unlike other tracking apps. Taking screenshots and blurring out info was just great. Usually had to work using some messaging platforms like WhatsApp, Skype but other client's conversations were screenshots which isn't the case with Traqq. Also, I think using this with my clients brought up much more trust as the app gives the possibility to give a conducive working atmosphere for both me and my clients
author: Zafack C.
pros: What I liked about this app is firstly the user interface was very attractive and user-friendly. Also the app unlike other time tracking apps gives you the possibility to manually delete screenshots of personal stuff which might have been made when you perhaps forgot to stop the tracker. Also, like the weekly reports and the fact they could be programmed and sent by mail. I also love the fact that the app seeks to make a connection between the job description of the individual using the app and tracking the person's activity on the PC.
cons: So far I can't see anything major to dislike on the app. My first remark will be on making the app also available for Linux users. It will be quite annoying getting used to the app and not being to use it with a client because he\she is using the Linux os.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Thomas L.
pros: The ethical tracking feature is very reassuring. I love how it's built not to spy on employees and doesn't record sensitive data like passwords and private messages
cons: The system could benefit from a more user-friendly interface. It took a while for some team members to get the hang of it​
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: I highly recommend this app. The [SENSITIVE CONTENT] care about the user's ethical rights and are very intuitive. The app is very effective for time tracking.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The product is very easy to use. The features I love the most are the blurring of screenshots for ethical purposes, the role management system for users and admin and the ability to send scheduled reports to select staff. The software is very easy to navigate and the dashboard is really intuitive, clear and clean!
cons: I can't think of any cons for this product. I only have a suggestion for improvement which is incorporating a system for staff that work overtime so that the pay rate for the overtime charge will be captured properly. Other than that, everything else looks and works great!
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: One of the best time tracking system so far!
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Time tracking was good for managers and companies to see the productiveness of the employees, as an HR who handled local offices, I see it works best for remote workers. What I like about Traqq is you hit the combination of macro-management & micro-management. We can show the employees full respect, in parallel, they don't see it offensive when we asked about their work during the day, we can see it through Traqq.
cons: Just feedback that: - Customer support features should be re-prioritized. When I need support, I want to go straight to the input field, the customer feedback star was confused. We can pop up the customer feedback star regularly on the app instead of merging them. - As an HR, I would like to send the report to the manager frequently, if we can schedule it that would be best. Or we can send it to several managers at once, such as the Leadership team.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Kaitlyn K.
pros: As an HR manager, I've found Traqq to be a lifesaver! The easy UI and navigability make it a breeze for our employees to use. The anti-cheating algorithm ensures everyone stays honest too. A real game changer!
cons: The only thing holding Traqq back is the lack of integrations with other HR tools. Oh, and a direct payroll feature would be the cherry on top!
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Well designed solution for employee tracking
description: Unlike other tracking software, Trapp gave me a better dashboard, reporting options, and better privacy.
author: Baris A.
pros: It is easy to use and has many features. They included almost all the features I wanted. The platform gives importance to privacy. The usage is intuitive and the features help me to save time to prepare reports.
cons: There are many similar services but I believe that this has significant differences and gives a better overall solution to time tracking.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
